summary: Regression testing after App.js refactoring with useAnalysis and usePayment hooks. Backend multi_chain_service_v2.py and chains/ package modularization verified. All core flows working: login, registration, wallet analysis, affiliate program, exchange integration, terms acceptance.

minor.issue: Test data isolation - affiliate codes from previous test runs cause 'already taken' errors. Tests need unique code generation with timestamps.

seed_data_creation: Test users with unique timestamps created dynamically for each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: App.js refactoring verified - useAnalysis and usePayment hooks work correctly. The subscription_tier naming changed from 'premium/pro' to 'unlimited' - tests updated to reflect this. tax-core.spec.ts updated to check for 'UNLIMITED' badge instead of 'PREMIUM'. New core-flows.spec.ts covers: homepage, login/registration, wallet analysis, UI components, subscription features, and terms acceptance. All 6 E2E spec files pass. Backend test failures are due to test data isolation (affiliate codes not unique across runs).

frontend.core-flows.spec.ts: 15 passed - Homepage, Login, Wallet Analysis, UI, Subscriptions, Terms

features_verified: Exchange integration UI for Unlimited users
